Hoshizora Robotics K.K. — APPI/My Number and FIEA retention/transfer workflow for issuer, board, employee and securities processes.
Scope: employee HR/payroll, board materials, shareholder registry, and acquisition diligence prepared for Tokyo Stock Exchange (TSE) timely disclosure (TDnet) where applicable.
PII under APPI includes living-individual identifiers; Specific Personal Information (My Number/個人番号) is collected only for tax and social insurance, stored encrypted, and segregated.
Retention: board minutes and timely disclosure back-up retained 10 years; payroll and withholding records containing My Number retained until statutory period lapses and then irreversibly deleted within 90 days.
Identifiers in internal test forms (e.g., 0000-0000-0000 for My Number, HRK-EMP-12345 for employee ID) are placeholders and not processed as actual personal data.
Transfers: processors in Japan and adequacy jurisdictions are bound by entrustment agreements; cross-border transfers otherwise require prior consent with notice of foreign regime per APPI and logging of onward disclosure.
DSAR: submit access/correction/suspension requests via privacy@hoshizora.example.jp or the ‘個人情報開示請求書’ form; we respond within a reasonable period except for statutory exemptions.
Fair Disclosure: we follow the FIEA Fair Disclosure Rule administered by the Financial Services Agency (FSA); inadvertent selective disclosure is cured by prompt TDnet release and posting on our IR site.
Blackout references in legacy calendars (FY2024 Q4) were completed and are not currently in force; employee trading remains subject to the Securities Dealing Policy generally.
Public information: the 2025-02-14 earnings release and the 2023 completed tender offer by Seiran Holdings SPC were disclosed on TDnet and remain public and stale.
Until TDnet release scheduled for 2026-07-15 08:30 JST, Section 4.2 draft regarding a proposed business combination with Komae Systems G.K. constitutes undisclosed material facts under FIEA and is restricted to directors, officers, and designated insiders.
Materiality is assessed relative to our consolidated financials and qualitative factors per TSE ‘timely disclosure’ practice; non-material operational updates (e.g., office move feasibility study) are not subject to blackout.
We do not store brokerage account numbers; where employee trade pre-clearance forms reference dummy fields like ACCT:XX-1234567, these are for template illustration only.
This note is not a substitute for the Basic Policy on Personal Information Protection or the Insider Trading Prevention Rules; consult the Compliance Helpline (weekday 09:00–17:00 JST) for clarifications.
